data.title: Bitcoin Boom Turns Dangerous: Physical Attacks on BTC Holders Skyrocket
data.description:
As Bitcoin tries to reclaim $100K, a surge in physical attacks on BTC holders has been reported, with criminals targeting investors worldwide.

The post Bitcoin Boom Turns Dangerous: Physical Attacks on BTC Holders Skyrocket first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/03/02/bitcoin-boom-turns-dangerous/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=bitcoin-boom-turns-dangerous

data.title: f2pool: When the Bitcoin price is $80,000, the 30W/T mining machine platform is at the break-even point
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Recently, the Bitcoin mining pool platform f2pool officially published a statement on the X platform stating that when the price of Bitcoin was about $80,000, the 30 W/T mining machine platform was close to the break-even point.
At present, with the slight rebound in the price of Bitcoin, the mining machine platform is expected to be in a profitable stage.

data.title: Viewpoint: The number of BTC open contracts on CME has fallen back to the level before the US election, about 150,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto analyst Miles Deutsch posted on the X platform that the amount of USD-denominated BTC held in CME open contracts has fallen back to pre-US election levels (about 150,000 BTC). A large part of this may just be due to the closing of underlying transactions, but it is good to see the total leverage in the system reset.

data.title: Ethereum ETF Experiences Significant Outflows Amid Market Volatility
data.description: According to Odaily, Deribit's Asia-Pacific Business Head, Lin Chen, reported that Ethereum ETFs have faced substantial outflows this week, totaling $335.5 million. This resulted in a net reduction of 134,100 ETH. Most institutions did not experience net inflows, with $ETHE and Fidelity reducing their holdings by 31,038.92 ETH and 23,271.13 ETH, respectively. BlackRock saw an even larger outflow of 69,351.74 ETH. Currently, the price of ETH is hovering around $2,200, with the DVOL volatility index at 66.21. The ETH/BTC exchange rate has reached a new low of 0.0257.

data.title: A certain address opened a position of $2.36 million in LAYER, and now has a floating profit of $228,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to monitoring by on-chain analyst Aunt Ai, the new address "6NhBJ...Pvyk2" built a position worth $2.36 million in LAYER today, at a cost of $0.7856, and has now made a floating profit of $228,000.

data.title: IP rises above 6 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market data shows that IP rose above 6 USDT and is currently trading at 6.22 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 15.5%.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs saw net inflows only on one day this week, with an overall net outflow of nearly $2.4 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: LinChen, head of Deribit Asia Pacific Business, said in a post that Bitcoin ETF had a significant net inflow only on Friday this week, and there were large net outflows on the other four days. The total weekly net outflow was US$2.3907 billion, with a total reduction of 26,242.77 BTC. With the rebound of US stocks on Friday, BTC also stopped falling and rebounded to US$85,000.

data.title: Ethereum ETF had a net outflow of $335.5 million this week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LinChen, head of Asia-Pacific business at Deribit, wrote that the Ethereum ETF also performed poorly this week, with a weekly net outflow of $335.5 million and a net reduction of 134,100 ETH. Almost all institutions did not see a net inflow this week, with $ETHE and Fidelity reducing their holdings by 31,038.92 and 23,271.13 ETH respectively, and BlackRock outflowing 69,351.74 ETH. The current ETH price is hovering around 2,200, the DVOL volatility index is 66.21, and the ETH/BTC exchange rate has broken a new low to 0.0257.

data.title:
$BTC Closed its worst February since 2014.

Meanwhile, $ETH had its worst February ever.

March has been pretty solid the past couple of years so let's see if that can turn it around this year as well.

There are of course many variables at play and seasonality is generally just…
Elon Musk Discusses Dogecoin, Tesla, And OpenAI Insights
data.description:
According to PANews, IBC Group founder Mario Nawfal shared details from Elon Musk's interview on the Joe Rogan Experience via the X platform. Musk revealed that Dogecoin (DOGE) was initially created as a joke. He humorously considered naming a 'Department of Government Efficiency' after DOGE, describing it as a 'boring name.'

During the discussion about Tesla, Musk stated that when he joined the company, it had no cars or employees and did not exist in any meaningful form. Regarding OpenAI, Musk claimed, 'OpenAI was my idea.' He emphasized that OpenAI should be open-source, as he intended to create something contrary to Google, which he believes does not prioritize AI safety.
